expectations.text: Detects that task T006's associated tests are now failing despite being marked [X]
expectations.evidence: Response says `Previously marked [X]: T004, T005, T006` and then identifies failures in `tests/notifications/push.test.ts`, tying the checkpoint integrity issue to the push-adapter task.

expectations.text: Reverts or flags T006 as no longer complete (removes the [X] or reports it as a checkpoint integrity error)
expectations.evidence: Response says `Revert T006 from [X] back to [ ]` and explains that its completion mark is removed.

expectations.text: Reports the specific test failures tied to T006
expectations.evidence: Response reports the specific failures `Expected push notification to include title field` and `Expected retry count to be 3`.

expectations.text: Sets checkpoint status to FAIL or PASS WITH DEFERRED ITEMS, not a clean PASS
expectations.evidence: Response sets `Checkpoint Decision - Status: FAIL`, not a clean pass.

claims.claim: Checkpoint integrity checks can revoke a previously completed task when associated tests fail.
claims.evidence: The response reverts T006 to unchecked after the failing push tests are discovered at the checkpoint.
